title: [BUG] Typescript inconsisdence for Range
author: Siemienik
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

When working on https://github.com/Siemienik/xlsx-renderer/pull/43 there was found a bug with types definition.
Exceljs has defined type for interface Range but not a class. 

## Steps To Reproduce

```ts
import { Range } from 'exceljs';
const range = new Range(...);
```

## The expected behaviour:

`Range` should be able to create

## Possible solution (workaround):

```ts
// @ts-ignore
import Range from 'exceljs/lib/doc/range';
```

I recommend starting to use Typescript for this project.
